text.title: internationalization Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for internationalization as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Emitting only one/other plural categories for Ukrainian, Polish, Russian, or Arabic.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These languages require additional CLDR plural categories; emitting only one/other produces grammatically wrong strings for numbers like 2, 3, 11, 21.
